author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(core): remove to-factory (#3378)
body:
* chore(core): remove to-factory

The impact it is having on our code base is negligent, but it takes up space, and can be removed since it's so trivial.

This save a little bit of space (.1 / .05 kb gz)

fixes #3327

* chore: remove from es6 bundle
